body:
## Summary
- Add a focused question-provenance runtime validation mode for malformed question/tag/provenance inputs.
- Surface CSV provenance/public-row summary counters in `validate-content` and the focus registry.
- Report whole-bank UHR source URL metadata drift as a summarized failure instead of hundreds of row failures, while preserving row-level CSV drift checks.

## Validation
- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-question-provenance-runtime`
- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-question-bank-csv`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "provenance|getQuestionProvenance|ProvenanceBadge|UHR|derived|editorial|invalid|tags|source note" scripts/static-site-source-provenance-copy.test.js tests/content-question-bank-csv-contract.test.js tests/content-question-card-accessibility-parity.test.js`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
title: test: harden question provenance validation
